verdict.summary: Server-side unhandled exception or internal failure. The server crashed, panicked, or returned a generic error without details.

dead_ends.action: Catch all exceptions in client and ignore INTERNAL status
dead_ends.why_fails: Silencing INTERNAL errors hides server-side bugs that need fixing. Log and alert on these errors.

dead_ends.action: Increase client timeout assuming server is slow
dead_ends.why_fails: INTERNAL status means the server failed, not that it is slow. Longer timeout will not fix a server-side exception.

workarounds.action: Check server-side logs for the actual exception and stack trace
workarounds.how: The gRPC INTERNAL status is generic. The real error is in server logs, not the client-side message.

workarounds.action: Add proper error handling in server RPC handlers
workarounds.how: Catch exceptions in handler; return grpc.StatusCode.INTERNAL with a descriptive message via context.abort()
GRPC_VERBOSITY=DEBUG GRPC_TRACE=all python server.py  # or set channelz for production observability
